errors.time_required: Please enter start and end times
errors.end_after_start: End time must be after the start time

bughunter.title: BugHunter
bughunter.description: Found a bug or have an idea? Let us know.

fields.subject: Subject (version {{version}})
fields.details_placeholder: Describe the bug or your idea... We'll get right on it.

banner.hint: Click the sparkles icon to assign or use the context menu.

empty.no_activity: No activity recorded for this period.

split.title: Split session
split.description: Move the slider to split the session into two parts and assign them to different projects.
split.ai_suggestion: AI suggested a split based on file activity

split_multi.title: Split session across multiple projects
split_multi.no_candidates: AI did not detect enough project candidates to split this session.

prompts.boost_requires_comment_prompt: Boost requires a comment. Enter a comment for {{label}}:
prompts.boost_comment_required: Comment is required to add boost.
prompts.boost_comment_save_failed: Failed to save comment required for boost: {{error}}
prompts.multiplier_positive: Multiplier must be a positive number.

errors.update_multiplier: Failed to update session rate multiplier: {{error}}

prompts.reset_knowledge_confirm: Reset AI knowledge? This deletes model tables and feedback history.

errors.project_folder_required: Project folder is required to identify tracked files.

confirm.exclude_project: Exclude this project? It can be restored later.
confirm.reset_project_time: Reset tracked time for this project? This cannot be undone.
confirm.compact_project_data: Compact this project's data? This will remove detailed file activity history, but will keep sessions and total time. This cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_project_permanent: Permanently delete project "{{projectLabel}}"? This will remove the project record, unassign linked apps/sessions/file activities, and delete manual sessions. This cannot be undone.

import_panel.title: Data Import
import_panel.description: Upload an export file to restore or sync your data.

export_panel.title: Data Export
export_panel.description: Export projects, sessions, and activity to a JSON file.
export_panel.all_time_description: Export all data from the beginning of time.

archive.title: Local Archive
archive.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{fileName}}?

fallbacks.load_chart_failed: Unable to load chart data. Try changing period or refreshing.
fallbacks.no_tracked_activity: No tracked activity in selected period.
fallbacks.no_project_timeline_data: No project timeline data for selected period.

daemon_page.unassigned_sessions_hint: {{count}} unassigned sessions. Assign them in Sessions/Timeline.
daemon_page.autostart_description: Start daemon automatically when Windows starts. Uses a shortcut in the Startup folder.

prompts.delete_app_confirm: Delete application "{{label}}" and all related sessions/files? This will remove the app row, {{sessionCount}} sessions, and related file activity records. This cannot be undone.

monitored.title: Monitored Applications
monitored.empty: No monitored applications. Add exe names above to start tracking.

validation.global_rate_range: Global rate must be between 0 and {{maxRate}}
validation.project_rate_range: Project rate must be empty or between 0 and {{maxRate}}

empty.no_active_time: No active project time in this date range.

tooltips.multiplied_sessions: {{count}} session(s) with rate multiplier - click to view
tooltips.bonus_hours: Includes {{bonusHours}} bonus hours from rate multipliers

empty.add_sections: Add sections from the list on the left

language.title: Language
language.description: Set the preferred interface language for TIMEFLOW.
language.rollout_note: Applies now to Help and Quick Start. Remaining views will be migrated in the next i18n phases.

settings.splitToleranceDesc1: Split only when projects have nearly identical scores.
settings.splitToleranceDesc2: Split when second project has ≥{{pct}}% of leader's score.
settings.splitToleranceDesc3: Split even with large score disparity.
settings.splitAutoDesc: Sessions meeting split conditions will be split automatically.

help.language_hint: Language is managed in Settings > Language.

quickstart.language_hint: Language is managed in Settings > Language.
quickstart.intro: Welcome to TIMEFLOW! Let's go through these few simple steps to properly configure your time tracking system.
quickstart.outro: That's all! Now you can enjoy full automation.

file_preparation.title: File Preparation
file_preparation.description: Place both .exe files (timeflow-dashboard.exe and timeflow-demon.exe) in the same folder and run timeflow-dashboard.exe.

projects_configuration.title: Projects Configuration
projects_configuration.description: In the Projects tab, point to the parent folder of your work. Each subfolder will be treated as a separate project.

adding_applications.title: Adding Applications
adding_applications.description: In the Applications tab, add process names (e.g. name.exe) you want to track. Give them friendly names. Do not leave the list empty, because the daemon will then fall back to monitor-all and start tracking every application.

starting_daemon.title: Starting the Demon
starting_daemon.description: In the Daemon tab, start it and enable 'Autostart ON'. The system will start working in the background.

assigning_sessions.title: Assigning Sessions
assigning_sessions.description: Right-click in the Dashboard tab to assign sessions. A star in the tray icon means unassigned sessions.

ai_training.title: AI Training
ai_training.description: A few manual assignments will train your local AI (AI & Model tab), which will then start automating the work for you.

inline.10ryj49pxcvfa: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This cannot be undone.
inline.11068301tcrsy1: Integrated metrics cards (total tracked time, number of apps, active projects).
inline.113cvvp9cy9x4: Session Limit: how many unassigned sessions auto-safe will scan in one batch.
inline.11g7tamjufgpl: Rollback only reverts sessions that have not been manually changed since the auto-safe run.
inline.11lcnbm1bat528: JSON Import – loading daily reports generated by the Daemon.
inline.11lz3li10yy2rh: Folder Sync – TIMEFLOW scans paths on every dashboard startup and automatically adds new projects (including .git repositories). A notification about discovered projects appears on the dashboard.
inline.11m8r6i1vfgabp: Enter a comment for this session (leave empty to remove).
inline.11pvhg2bx46w5: Daily/Weekly range mode – switch the sessions list between daily and weekly views to review longer periods faster.
inline.11s1gsk8cm7cx: Search – filter projects by name or folder path in real time.
inline.11wukcj4xu7iu: First-session assignment and local AI onboarding instructions.
inline.129fdyb7hh3o: Automatically assigns sessions (requires >85% confidence and strong evidence).
inline.12a0l5vngm7e0: Activity Heatmaps – hourly and daily visualization of your engagement.
inline.12l28j81lhyb14: Demo mode uses a separate SQLite file and reads live daily refreshes from the fake_data directory; JSON filenames should then include fake, for example 2026-02-22_fake.json.
inline.12oq9x714jb78f: Control center for the background process responsible for data collection.
inline.12v87z4p88fmm: Auto-safe is disabled. Set mode to auto_safe and save settings.
inline.14hfeskgykto3: Status Control & Diagnostics – monitor if the time tracking system is working correctly.
inline.14kd5lg18o39jt: Split Session – from the context menu or scissors icon, split a session into multiple parts (max 5) and assign each to a different project. AI automatically analyzes file activity and suggests the split.
inline.14w289syqwcrb: 'To' time must be later than 'From' time.
inline.168z83i197whfb: Version Insight – information on the compatibility of Daemon and Dashboard versions.
inline.1697a53cfx519: Localization – the Daemon tray menu automatically switches between PL/EN based on the language setting in the Dashboard (Settings > Language).
inline.16ef0011bqie0l: Periodic sync after app startup. Default is every 30 minutes.
inline.16rcoxusf1ldg: Managing task structure and intelligent automation of project detection.
inline.16z17aq16jmh8x: Lowering this threshold means the model will make suggestions even when it's not super confident. Consequence: you'll get more suggestions, and by correcting the wrong ones, the model will learn to distinguish harder cases much faster. But if you feel "spammed" by nonsensical suggestions, slowly increase it to 0.6.
inline.171xa3027njxg: Training Horizon – set how many days of history (e.g. 30–730) are used for training.
inline.179c4nk1w49vll: Windows Autostart – automatic startup of TIMEFLOW upon system login.
inline.179ookp1i885bx: Unassigned sessions indicator – badge with the count of sessions awaiting assignment, visible directly on the Daemon screen.
inline.17gc7allc7rnn: Demo Mode – switch to a demo database (test without affecting real data).
inline.17nw2uo3szuxp: Quick overview of your current activity and key performance indicators.
inline.17otzq71uclqpa: Refresh button synchronizing data directly from the running Daemon.
inline.17pw21q4jeu2i: Report generation – button in the top toolbar of the project page. Select a template, then preview, print, or export to PDF.
inline.182eth74841dd: Stacked Bar Charts – percentage share of projects in your total work time.
inline.18pvj8nkyc57s: Root folders – manage disk locations that TIMEFLOW should monitor.
inline.18xox3vi5bp3p: Auto Optimize DB – schedule automatic SQLite optimization and run optimization manually.
inline.199xbri1d1kfo4: Time of day and day of the week (your work habits).
inline.19bxzfj7f1j5m: Operation History – insight into when and what data was modified.
inline.19eb8p329fi7p: Demo Mode and Sync – when switched to the demo database, online synchronization is disabled to prevent mixing test and production data.

inline.19wmgij1cgmfi4: Detailed list of all activity blocks registered in the system.
inline.1am7zb31ppfy9x: Log coloring – ERROR and WARN lines are highlighted with color for quick problem identification.

inline.1arn9nitdfwnf: Right-click their segments to assign each session to a project.
inline.1asr6fw1lmfuxq: Generated automatically and used to identify this machine during sync.

inline.1b65qqv14mutrl: Accessible from the sidebar rocket icon and from the Help screen.
inline.1b9h1t31w8fs9y: Importing, exporting, and organizing the knowledge base.
inline.1bio7an1ckqgju: server_snapshot_pruned scenario – if the server payload was cleaned after ACK, run a local reseed/export to rebuild sync state.
inline.1c1v8rhryxunp: Hidden by default to avoid accidental clicks.
inline.1c6imga7m619n: ACK statuses in Online Sync – the status area shows whether local changes are still waiting for server confirmation (ACK pending).

inline.1g0bp6itshk29: Interactive legend – project list with colors and times; clicking an item filters the chart to the selected project.

inline.1gjyo0yuxvj3q: "Model Status" card – diagnostic panel with 6 tiles: current mode, training state (idle/in progress), last training date, corrections since training, last training metrics (samples/time), and last auto-safe run.

inline.1i1md5wtntq1f: Project profitability analysis over time (monthly and yearly views).

inline.1j67si8lvk5hs: Highlight Color – choose the highlight color for working-hours zones on charts.

inline.1jt7jabe03vzp: Which programs you assign to which projects.

inline.1k4zyno1apq7km: Sync on startup – perform synchronization immediately after Dashboard startup.
inline.1kamf60wu6iz0: (increase from 3. This means the model must have strong confirmation in at least 5 similar, previously user-approved sessions to act without your consent).

inline.1km27nmdngy17: System Maintenance – cleaning old records and optimizing file size.

inline.1kyhrxx1kg12jh: Negative points if the model detected traits suggesting the assignment could be murky despite other strong signals.
inline.1l0esjtoa21mq: Your data is your property. Everything is stored locally in a secure SQLite database.
inline.1l77viujllx70: Runs status -> pull/push after local auto-import finishes.
inline.1l93zgx1fdo486: Unassign {{count}} automatic sessions from this project?
inline.1m0lnk31o8naha: AI Suggestions – review and approve (or reject) project suggestions generated by AI.
inline.1me2el37igjeg: TIMEFLOW logo and version – the report header includes the app logo and version number, visible in PDF prints.
inline.1mhr24l75l0rz: Suggest Min Confidence: minimum confidence to show suggestion in sessions.
inline.1mng3461kvsgve: Training blacklists – exclude selected applications and folders from model training to keep the dataset clean.
inline.1mntyx01hwqe37: Auto-split runs in cycles: it starts after import and repeats every 60 seconds. In one pass it analyzes up to 50 unassigned sessions and performs at most 5 splits.
inline.1mp25km12vsltg: Manual session addition – register meetings, calls, or offline work.
inline.1n1f6fm1fmbqnp: ZIP Export – quick archiving of the entire database or selected projects to .zip.
inline.1n5ywfj1uguj1u: Project list modes in the assignment menu: Active A-Z, Newest -> Top -> Rest, and Top -> Newest -> Rest. They speed up selection when you have many projects.
inline.1ncbtep1d5lpgf: Monthly view with week numbers – facilitates planning and retrospection.
inline.1niiuc2kr7pl1: Service Management – start, stop, and restart the Daemon directly from the dashboard.
inline.1ntgxxtjg88r4: Includes session multipliers in the final project valuation.
inline.1nwebmyjs5qja: possible duplicate names in this tab
inline.1o3o93h1k80qy4: Deletes all imported sessions and history from local database.
inline.1oinkkel2ethv: Candidate Detection – the system suggests project creation based on folder activity.
inline.1outoc9dr0rkk: Scissors icon – appears on sessions where AI detected file activity across multiple projects. Click to split the session based on AI suggestions.
inline.1p102zha0q5dw: Unlike traditional tools, TIMEFLOW intelligently analyzes window activity, processes, and files to precisely assign your time to the correct projects.
inline.1p42ekl15g4uj5: No project activity in selected day.
inline.1p6vop7vtqesr: ReportView – full-screen report preview (without the side panel) optimized for print and PDF export.
inline.1pd6yqf1joegxu: Real-time Logs – preview of the event log to identify issues.
inline.1pdskrf1vppebs: Please configure a backup path first
inline.1pe4j84d0we6: Show project suggestions for unassigned sessions
inline.1pns8rv16u4qjn: Save detailed sync operations to log file for debugging.
inline.1q5lzb11l0h96y: Sorting and filtering by application, project, date, and duration.
inline.1q9v0ph17tsmy0: Summary metrics – 4 tiles: AI precision (% correct suggestions), Total feedback, Auto-safe assignments, Detected path coverage. Additional indicators: title_history and activity_type coverage.
inline.1qfvhvu16mn9p3: Additional sections: Boosts (sessions with time multiplier), Manual sessions (manually added), Comments, AI Statistics.
inline.1qjjijq11oc1z9: The model analyzes your historical, manual session assignments to projects. During 'training', it builds statistical tables based on three main pillars:
inline.1qlk6oxl7p663: Keywords extracted from file names and windows (the strongest signal).
inline.1qq013a1cx27bj: Archive import (.zip) – package validation before import and safe merge of historical data.
inline.1r5i8qn1md80gk: App colors – inline picker with preset palette and custom color. Click the color next to an app name to change it.
inline.1rbmrl69tv35j: Last manual sync: skipped (disabled in Demo Mode)
inline.1rctsrt1481yki: Multiplier must be > 0. Use 1 to reset.
inline.1ri12rkwvuut: Auto-sync interval – configure automatic synchronization interval (1–1440 min).
inline.1rkrra9ofif7r: Interactive timeline with hourly view (today) or daily view (longer periods).
inline.1rl1lk45tqmw: Appearance & Performance – disable chart animations to improve UI responsiveness.
inline.1rqssu01mt3mio: BugHunter – the bug icon in the sidebar allows quick bug reporting with attachments.
inline.1sfg7pz1py0d6y: Danger Zone – two-step confirmation: first "arm" the button, then click to confirm. Protects against accidental database wipe.
inline.1sicyd0vgmnus: Multi-day manual sessions – the "Allow session across multiple days" option lets you save longer events that cross midnight.
inline.1su16pq1u7ff9l: Working Hours – define work hours (affects timeline color scheme).
inline.1t0mq39mvbfaz: All model data is stored in your local SQLite database (assignment_model_state, etc.), so the system gets smarter with each of your corrections.
inline.1tgh8b3gepfdu: Period navigation – Previous/Next arrows let you move between days, weeks, or months.
inline.1tkd1mehqghbg: Auto-freezing – the system automatically 'freezes' projects unused for a specified number of days.
inline.1ts6hgn929pu9: Color change – click the color dot on the project card to change the project color (preset palette + custom color).
inline.1txrvksqve3uc: Train after a larger series of manual corrections, after importing new data, or when the reminder indicates that the model needs refreshing.
inline.1ul3s1h1n5u4cb: Keep this mode. The AI will suggest connections/categories but won't assign them automatically. Your manual approvals (or rejections/corrections) are the most crucial element in building the model's "knowledge". (In auto mode, the model wouldn't ask your opinion in some cases, losing a potential chance for confirmation).
inline.1uyu7xj124sms4: View modes: Detailed (full file logs), Compact (apps and sessions list only), and AI Data (precise statistics and AI model reasoning).
inline.1v7cujvrtxg2k: No sessions found for this project.
inline.1vu27eq1rqhqz0: Show the score details button (BarChart3) on each session
inline.1w3ls1i5fyf10: 'Top 5 Projects' charts and analysis of most used applications.
inline.1w54zqbppvnub: Auto-safe Min Evidence: how many signals (e.g. app/token/time history) must confirm decision.
inline.1w6fbnl13korz8: Monitored Applications – section for managing processes actively tracked by the Daemon. Add new processes (exe_name + display name), remove unwanted ones, rename them. The monitored app count is shown as a badge.
inline.1w7mxc61qnsiq7: Sidebar status indicators act as a control center: they show daemon, sync, AI, and backup state, and clicking them opens the relevant diagnostic screen.
inline.1we0t3q1a7yjoa: Emergency Clear – option to completely clear the database and settings.
inline.1wi299n1793iaa: Manual session rebuild – button in the Session Management card forces session re-merge (gap fill) without restarting the app.
inline.1wsj2s414avl5t: Business module for precise conversion of time into finances.
inline.1wzj5dv9qen7c: Manual session valuation – meetings and calls are added to the project budget.
inline.1x1lt1e1fbiu58: Demo mode is active. New imports/changes will affect the demo database.
inline.1x4b1tk74qe2k: Batch assign from project header – the group context menu lets you assign or unassign the whole block of sessions for a project.
inline.1xdvjzq1knig9j: Online sync is disabled while Demo Mode is active.
inline.1xh316bu8ojx0: AI progress charts – two charts: (1) Feedback trend – stacked bar chart with Accept, Reject, and Manual corrections per day; (2) Auto-safe runs vs rollback – assigned bars + runs and rollbacks lines. Default window: 30 days.
inline.1xpelammnlsh3: Apply this comment to all sessions in this group.
inline.1xpxpe61615eee: Compaction removes detailed file-level history while preserving sessions and total time.
inline.1xtap041ryszk: Apply current merge gap to already imported sessions.
inline.1xwi5np18l2sgn: Deep visualization of your habits and work intensity.
inline.1ylcehve0ij13: Auto-safe limit – control the maximum number of sessions processed in a single Auto-safe run.
inline.1ynwnbtk9a158: The TIMEFLOW Daemon monitors used applications and active documents without your intervention.
inline.208osxrjva8n: Manual sessions cannot be unassigned (they must belong to a project). Delete them instead.
inline.28yex9wyftt2: No candidate projects (detected items already match existing/excluded projects).
inline.2fuobrheuddr: Report template editor – choose report sections and their order (header, stats, financials, apps, sessions, boosts, manual sessions, comments, AI).
inline.2lx4m8147fkgr: Intensity Analysis – charts showing what hours you work most effectively.
inline.39i9y995nyza: Project data compaction – action in the project view that reduces data size without losing time summaries.
inline.3fpu9r7dd8d: Directly assign an entire application to a specific project.
inline.3rv8rmcv52qo: The reminder appears automatically when: you have at least {{feedbackTrigger}} new corrections or over {{retrainHours}}h passed since last training and there are new corrections.
inline.40j8m01ekq6cc: Auto-rebuild on startup – automatically rebuild/merge sessions on application startup.
inline.45ne8b169367t: Learning Center – every manual correction of yours becomes a new lesson for the model.
inline.478jp3orvewp: Session Split – settings in a dedicated card: tolerance coefficient (0.2–1.0), max projects per session (2–5), and auto-split toggle. Higher tolerance means more conservative splits.
inline.4e1h22195ikpm: Auto-safe Min Confidence: required confidence threshold for automatic assignment.
inline.55rqvtr4ng5l: Rollback – ability to undo the last batch assignment run by the AI.
inline.58n785yk5gbe: Demo mode disabled. Dashboard now uses the primary database.
inline.5dahe91lcc44q: Applies to the whole dashboard app (reads/writes/imports) and switches to a separate SQLite file. In demo mode, live daily refresh reads from fake_data and expects fake in the JSON filename (for example 2026-02-22_fake.json).
inline.5kgi2i1ut3fq1: Confidence Policy – set how certain the model must be to automatically assign data.
inline.5ll3wc1djuqx6: The "AI Data" view presents the model's "train of thought" for assigned or suggested sessions. Here is how to read its metrics:
inline.6cmpgh1q19fm2: Global hourly rate configuration and specific rates for chosen projects.
inline.6el9ah1jvn6qg: Timeline Project View – detailed timeline broken down by specific tasks.
inline.6jzxgr1lw7f2z: The full tutorial walks through installation and configuration end-to-end.
inline.6n522pvfgd9m: UI language (PL/EN) – language switch for the whole Dashboard and Daemon tray menu.
inline.6zb8jq160dc8k: Freezing – hide inactive projects to keep them from cluttering session assignment.
inline.71gwikywv8jl: The number of similar past sessions you manually approved. This is the hardest proof for the model – the more evidence, the more certain the decision.
inline.7b94qnouyadd: Step by step guidance from .exe preparation to launching the Daemon.
inline.7otbffg2jmli: Reset tracked time for this project? This cannot be undone.
inline.7pq1n68mwo7s: Training Notifications – the system notifies you when new knowledge has been gathered.
inline.8292wj1xk7mcp: Freeze Threshold – configure the number of days after which projects are frozen.
inline.8k1zqv69exow: "How to train and configure" card – built-in guide with three sections: when to train, what parameters mean, and recommended starting settings.
inline.8l6vdx16uvz8d: Adding comments and notes – right-click a session to create a description.
inline.8to2plfd35wd: Auto-Safe Mode – secure, batch session assignment (requires confidence and evidence thresholds).
inline.8yc8r61j26b9p: Proprietary local ML engine (Rust) analyzing app context, time of day, and file/window tokens. Works 100% offline.
inline.98xnnk8zmao2: Unfreezing – use the flame icon to restore a project to the active tasks list.
inline.9o04df1snvk2: Section reordering – up/down arrows on each section in the template editor let you set a custom order of report elements.
inline.9wl8zisy83c4: Expressed in percentage (0-100%), it's the model's certainty about its choice. Above the set threshold (e.g., 40%), the model generates a suggestion.
inline.9yotcsav0kne: "Files/activity" section – report templates can include file/activity details, not only time summaries.
inline.9zkezv1mdv7xy: Configuration of project folders and app processes to be tracked.
inline.aap3dfufugr2: Number of days without activity after which a project is automatically frozen.
inline.ancktd8bx66q: Quick time range switching: Today, Week, Month, All Time.
inline.axf1p5vlbzj7: Add manual session from timeline – click on the dashboard timeline to quickly add a manual session (e.g. meeting, call) without navigating to Sessions.
inline.bbnt3l11ktolr: Feedback Weight: how much manual corrections (thumbs up/down, reassignments) influence the model during training. Higher = corrections dominate more. Default: 5.
inline.bc5mrtv1up8b: Used to highlight expected work window on timeline.
inline.bn9nsewxhv92: Suggests a project in the menu (requires >60% confidence).
inline.bvbspb3qunav: Project card (ProjectPage) – full project view: data compaction, time reset, inline name edit, timeline with comments, manual sessions, and report generation.
inline.c4a5071j1re1n: Allows the dashboard to exchange data snapshots with the sync server.
inline.cek4ab1g8navc: Reset AI knowledge – button that clears all learned model knowledge (with confirmation). Useful after a major project structure change.
inline.ch5hu10sqczb: Fast TIMEFLOW setup for a new install and first launch.

inline.u3e5l9134g19h: Feedback weight determines how strongly a single correction from you affects the model's subsequent decisions. Higher value = the model adapts faster to your fresh behaviors and corrections. Important: if the weight is too high (e.g., 50), the model might "go crazy" after a single accidental mistake. A value of 10-15 allows for efficient learning while being a relatively stable option.
